query:
-- The screenshot shows services like S8JR3KM (pbx Coastal Dental -4432%), SHB64AC (docsamfdvout -523%), etc.
-- These are NOT in our negative margin query above - they must be showing in the UI differently
-- Let's check those specific services
SELECT 
  s.externalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.supplierName, s.monthlyCost,
  c.name as customerName,
  ROUND(SUM(bi.lineAmount), 2) as totalRevenue,
  COUNT(sba.id) as assignmentCount,
  ROUND(SUM(bi.lineAmount) - s.monthlyCost, 2) as margin
FROM service_billing_assignments sba
JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.externalId = sba.billingItemExternalId
JOIN services s ON s.externalId = sba.serviceExternalId
JOIN customers c ON c.externalId = s.customerExternalId
WHERE s.externalId IN ('S8JR3KM', 'SHB64AC', 'S72C54J', 'S1UMCO4', 'SKY3MLC', 'SGVQT30', 'SHU42OX', 'SEEV150', 'SZR96SE', 'SSE3JV7', 'S66U54A')
GROUP BY s.externalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.supplierName, s.monthlyCost, c.name;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
-- The screenshot shows services like S8JR3KM (pbx Coastal Dental -4432%), SHB64AC (docsamfdvout -523%), etc.
-- These are NOT in our negative margin query above - they must be showing in the UI differently
-- Let's check those specific services
SELECT 
  s.externalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.supplierName, s.monthlyCost,
  c.name as customerName,
  ROUND(SUM(bi.lineAmount), 2) as totalRevenue,
  COUNT(sba.id) as assignmentCount,
  ROUND(SUM(bi.lineAmount) - s.monthlyCost, 2) as margin
FROM service_billing_assignments sba
JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.externalId = sba.billingItemExternalId
JOIN services s ON s.externalId = sba.serviceExternalId
JOIN customers c ON c.externalId = s.customerExternalId
WHERE s.externalId IN ('S8JR3KM', 'SHB64AC', 'S72C54J', 'S1UMCO4', 'SKY3MLC', 'SGVQT30', 'SHU42OX', 'SEEV150', 'SZR96SE', 'SSE3JV7', 'S66U54A')
GROUP BY s.externalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.supplierName, s.monthlyCost, c.name;
